name: app-01-main-value
domain: app productivity consumer mobile saas wellness education finance
good_pattern: Verb plus concrete outcome: Plan your week; Track every habit; Review weak words
avoid: Best app; #1; Download now; vague hype; unsupported outcomes
localization_notes: Keep 2-6 words; allow 30-100 percent text expansion.

name: app-02-core-workflow
domain: app productivity consumer mobile saas wellness education finance
good_pattern: Action clarity: Capture ideas fast; Scan every receipt; Review every task
avoid: Tiny process text; feature not visible; too many verbs
localization_notes: Use one visible action from the screenshot; avoid idioms.

name: app-03-differentiator
domain: app productivity consumer mobile saas wellness education finance
good_pattern: Specific benefit: See patterns clearly; Compare every option; Learn smarter words
avoid: AI magic claims without visible evidence; unverifiable superiority
localization_notes: If translated copy grows, keep line breaks intentional.

name: app-04-personalization-progress
domain: app productivity consumer mobile wellness education
good_pattern: User-owned progress: Build your streak; Save your routine; Follow your progress
avoid: Fake testimonials; fake user count; ranking claims
localization_notes: Progress terms must match the UI language and metric.

name: app-05-trust-control
domain: app productivity consumer mobile saas finance health
good_pattern: Reassurance: Stay in control; Protect your data; Adjust every alert
avoid: Security/health/finance guarantees unless verified; legal claims
localization_notes: Use plain language; avoid promises that become compliance claims.

name: saas-01-dashboard-value
good_pattern: Operational outcome: See queue health; Review accounts faster; Track team load
avoid: Marketing hero copy; huge abstract benefit; unsupported ROI
localization_notes: Keep dashboard terminology consistent with product labels.

name: saas-02-workflow
good_pattern: Workflow clarity: Filter every queue; Resolve tasks faster; Compare account risk
avoid: Decorative charts not in app; tiny table text as proof
localization_notes: Caption should point to one visible workflow.

name: finance-01-trust
good_pattern: Trust-first value: Review spending clearly; Track every payment; Monitor risk
avoid: Profit guarantees; investment returns; pressure CTAs
localization_notes: Avoid investment-performance promises and locale-sensitive money claims.

name: health-01-care
good_pattern: Calm outcome: Track symptoms gently; Book care faster; Follow your plan
avoid: Medical claims; cure language; alarming words
localization_notes: Prefer calm wording; verify regulated claims manually.

name: education-01-learning
good_pattern: Learning result: Practice every day; Review weak words; Learn with context
avoid: Guaranteed grades; ranking claims; pressure language
localization_notes: Leave extra room for translated education terms.

name: game-01-gameplay
domain: game mobile horror hyper casual puzzle rpg action strategy
good_pattern: Fantasy plus verb: Survive the ward; Solve under pressure; Race the clock
avoid: Main menu only; fake poster art; cinematic scene without gameplay
localization_notes: Keep gameplay visible; avoid covering controls or board.

name: game-02-core-mechanic
domain: game mobile horror hyper casual puzzle rpg action strategy
good_pattern: Mechanic clarity: Dash past danger; Match under pressure; Build your squad
avoid: Mechanic not visible; confusing metaphor; long tutorial copy
localization_notes: Use the same verb the player would use in-game.

name: game-03-progression-shop
domain: game mobile horror hyper casual puzzle rpg action strategy
good_pattern: Progress promise: Upgrade your kit; Unlock new tools; Build your loadout
avoid: Paywall pressure; sale urgency; fake rewards
localization_notes: Avoid implying paid offers or discounts unless current and verified.

name: game-04-variety-challenge
domain: game mobile horror hyper casual puzzle rpg action strategy
good_pattern: Content depth: Face new threats; Explore new stages; Beat tougher missions
avoid: Fake boss; fake event; time-limited claim that will expire
localization_notes: Avoid time-sensitive event copy unless the asset is seasonal.

name: game-05-collection-mastery
domain: game mobile horror hyper casual puzzle rpg action strategy
good_pattern: Long-term hook: Collect rare gear; Climb the ranks; Master every level
avoid: Fake leaderboard rank; unverifiable social proof; #1 claims
localization_notes: If ranking is real, avoid claiming store/category rank.

name: horror-game-01-gameplay
good_pattern: Tense gameplay: Survive the ward; Find the tape; Escape the basement
avoid: Poster background hiding gameplay; gore shock copy; fake monster
localization_notes: Translated horror nouns can grow; keep caption zone wide.

name: horror-game-03-progression
good_pattern: Progression: Upgrade your light; Unlock safer routes; Prepare each run
avoid: Bright arcade sale language; reward not visible
localization_notes: Keep tone restrained and theme-native.

name: hyper-casual-01-instant-read
domain: hyper casual game puzzle runner mobile
good_pattern: Instant action: Tap at the right time; Stack higher; Clear the path
avoid: Complex lore; main menu; long caption
localization_notes: Short verbs work best; make room for large type.

name: cozy-game-01-fantasy
good_pattern: Cozy fantasy: Grow your garden; Build your farm; Decorate your home
avoid: High-pressure urgency; aggressive monetization copy
localization_notes: Localize nouns carefully; keep tone warm and simple.

name: strategy-game-01-depth
good_pattern: Strategic value: Command the squad; Control the map; Plan every turn
avoid: Overloaded battle text; fake win rate; unsupported AI claim
localization_notes: Use precise verbs; avoid jargon outside target audience.

name: feature-graphic-core-value
good_pattern: Core value: one focal UI/game moment plus short brand-consistent phrase
avoid: Tiny details; cutoff-zone text; duplicate app icon branding; store badges
localization_notes: Localize graphic text; keep focal content centered.

name: audit-copy-risk
good_pattern: Rewrite risky copy into visible-screen value: Best becomes Track progress; Download now becomes Start a plan
avoid: Best; #1; Top; New; Free; Discount; Sale; Million Downloads; Download now; Install now; Play now; Try now
localization_notes: Risk words often expand awkwardly in localization; remove rather than translate.

name: listing-app-store-title
good_pattern: Brand or product name plus one primary search phrase when natural
avoid: Keyword stuffing; repeated subtitle/keyword terms; competitor brands; unverifiable ranking claims
localization_notes: 30 chars max; localize title variants instead of translating mechanically.

name: listing-app-store-subtitle
good_pattern: One clear value phrase that complements the title
avoid: Repeating title terms; vague hype; unsupported outcomes; direct install CTAs
localization_notes: 30 chars max; reserve expansion room for localized nouns.

name: listing-app-store-keywords
good_pattern: Comma-separated unique search terms not already in title/subtitle
avoid: Duplicate keywords; competitor brands; broad unrelated traffic words; spaces wasted on repeated phrases
localization_notes: 100 chars including commas; validate per locale.

name: listing-google-play-title
good_pattern: Readable title with primary keyword only if it fits the brand
avoid: Keyword stuffing; store badges; competitor brands; ranking or price claims
localization_notes: 30 chars max; title is visible and weighted.

name: listing-google-play-short
good_pattern: One compact benefit tied to visible product value
avoid: Dense feature list; hype; unverifiable promises; direct download/install CTA
localization_notes: 80 chars max; write separate localized short descriptions.

name: listing-google-play-full
good_pattern: Lead with value, then proof, features, trust, and support details
avoid: Keyword lists; repeated title terms; copied competitor phrasing; stale event claims
localization_notes: 4000 chars max; localize examples, units, and compliance wording.
